info.name: Microsoft Exchange Microsoft Graph Contacts API

params.name: $top
params.description: The number of items to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: The number of items to skip

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression

params.name: $orderby
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to sort by

params.name: $search
params.description: Search string to filter results

items.docs: Get a contact collection from the default contacts folder of the signed-in user. Returns all contacts in the user's mailbox.
Add a contact to the root contacts folder or the contacts endpoint of another contact folder.

params.name: contact-id
params.description: The unique identifier of the contact

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

items.docs: Read properties and relationships of a contact object.

params.name: contact-id
params.description: The unique identifier of the contact

items.docs: Update the properties of a contact object.

params.name: contact-id
params.description: The unique identifier of the contact

items.docs: Delete a contact object. The contact is moved to the Deleted Items folder.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

params.name: $deltatoken
params.description: The delta token returned from a previous delta call

params.name: $skiptoken
params.description: The skip token for paging through results

items.docs: Get a set of contacts that have been added, deleted, or updated in the user's mailbox. A delta function call for contacts is similar to a GET request, except that by applying state tokens, you can query for incremental changes.

params.name: $top
params.description: The number of items to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: The number of items to skip

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

items.docs: Get the contact folder collection in the default contacts folder of the signed-in user.
Create a new contact folder as a child of a specified folder or as a top-level folder.

params.name: contactFolder-id
params.description: The unique identifier of the contact folder

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

items.docs: Get a contact folder by using the contact folder ID.

params.name: contactFolder-id
params.description: The unique identifier of the contact folder

items.docs: Update the properties of a contact folder object.

params.name: contactFolder-id
params.description: The unique identifier of the contact folder

items.docs: Delete a contact folder. The folder is moved to the Deleted Items folder.
